title: chrysanthemum japonense
intro: Chrysanthemum japonense, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or autumn chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum japonense include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Chrysanthemum japonense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
